note: Reviewer subagents were not callable from the agent context (no Task/SendMessage tool surfaced). The producing agent performed a structured self-review against code-writing review dimensions. This report should be re-run by the team lead with the actual dev-code-reviewer subagent before merging.
observations: Pattern adherence: file open, defer close, scanner loop, error wrapping match cpu.go and diskstats.go exactly.
filepath.Clean applied before os.Open in all three reader functions (gosec G304 compliance).
Path construction uses fmt.Sprintf with %d integer formatting — no string concatenation with user input.
Error wrapping uses fmt.Errorf with %w as required by patterns.md.
Documentation comments on every exported type and function. Internal helpers (readProcPidStatFile, readProcPidIOFile) documented as test seams.
golangci-lint reports zero warnings for the new files.
gosec reports zero issues for the package.
